name: Co-Diagnostics, Inc.
business: Co-Diagnostics, Inc. develops, manufactures and sells reagents used for diagnostic tests for detection of infectious diseases, including tests for COVID-19, influenza, tuberculosis, hepatitis B and C, human papillomavirus, malaria, chikungunya, dengue, and Zika virus. These diagnostic tests are cleared for use in clinical labs only. The company also sells multiplexed tests for mosquito-borne pathogens to mosquito abatement districts.
sellsTo: Distributors covering clinical labs in over 50 countries

exposures.sentence: develops, manufactures and sells reagents used for diagnostic tests that function via the detection and/or analysis of nucleic acid molecules (DNA or RNA), including molecular tools for detection of infectious diseases.
We have developed a portable diagnostic device and test system designed for point-of-care and at-home use.

catalysts.event: Clinical performance studies for ABCR test commenced
catalysts.sentence: we announced on November 17, 2025 that the clinical performance studies for the ABCR test were underway.

catalysts.event: Formation of CoMira joint venture with Arabian Eagle Manufacturing
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we entered into a definitive agreement with Arabian Eagle Manufacturing, a regional manufacturing and distribution company based in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia (KSA) to form CoMira Diagnostics (CoMira), a joint venture dedicated to research, develop, manufacture, assemble, distribute, and commercialize Co-Dx technologies and intellectual property
